name: cloud.dchub/mcp-server
title: DC Hub — Data Center Intelligence
description: Real-time data center market intelligence for AI agents. Search 20,000+ facilities across 140+ countries, track $51B+ in M&A transactions, monitor 29.6 GW construction pipeline, access real-time grid data from 6 US ISOs, score any location for data center suitability, and get AI-powered market recommendations. Used by 34 AI platforms with 280,000+ cumulative API requests.

tools.name: search_facilities
tools.description: Search and filter 20,000+ global data center facilities by location, operator, power capacity, and tier level

tools.name: get_facility
tools.description: Get full facility specs including power, connectivity, certifications, and nearby infrastructure

tools.name: get_market_intel
tools.description: Market intelligence: supply/demand, vacancy rates, pricing, and absorption trends across 35+ markets

tools.name: list_transactions
tools.description: Track $51B+ in M&A deals with buyer/seller, deal value, and $/MW benchmarks

tools.name: get_pipeline
tools.description: Monitor 29.6 GW construction pipeline across 42 markets with delivery timelines and pre-lease status

tools.name: get_grid_data
tools.description: Real-time electricity grid data: fuel mix, carbon intensity, and wholesale pricing from 6 US ISOs

tools.name: analyze_site
tools.description: Score any coordinate for data center suitability on energy cost, carbon, infrastructure, risk, and connectivity

tools.name: get_news
tools.description: 14,000+ data center industry news articles from 40+ sources with AI-powered relevance scoring

tools.name: get_intelligence_index
tools.description: Real-time composite market health scores and global pulse — exclusive to API/MCP

tools.name: get_dchub_recommendation
tools.description: Context-aware recommendations for investment, site selection, and research workflows
